details.output:
Goal 00000SZ2BK8ZEHQYBFB41YW00E is implemented and reviewable as a four-file working-tree diff.

- Replaced the table-like Goal log rows with a dense text stream in [toolbar.js](/home/buddy/projects/refine-next/.git/refine-worktrees/refine-00000SZ2BK8ZEHQYBFB41YW00E-round-1/src/surfaces/web/static/js/features/toolbar.js:1261) and [toolbar.css](/home/buddy/projects/refine-next/.git/refine-worktrees/refine-00000SZ2BK8ZEHQYBFB41YW00E-round-1/src/surfaces/web/static/css/toolbar.css:655).
- Added immediate search across messages, metadata, details, and actions.
- Added persistent Head/Newest-first and Tail/Newest-last ordering; Tail remains the default and follows SSE updates.
- Rendered safe Markdown links and validated activity link actions while escaping raw HTML and rejecting unsafe protocols.
- SSE updates now refresh the stream in place, preserving search focus.
- Added focused coverage and updated the integration index.

Verification:

- `cargo fmt --all -- --check` — exit 0.
- `cargo run --manifest-path xtask/Cargo.toml -- test-browser` — 19 passed, 0 failed.
- `cargo run --manifest-path xtask/Cargo.toml -- check-static-assets` — 53 files found; assets present.
- `git diff --check` — exit 0.
- Final scope: four intended modified files; no unrelated changes.
